documentation.file_docstring: FileConsentCard utilities for MS Teams large file uploads (>4MB) in personal chats. Teams requires user consent before the bot can upload large files. This module provides utilities for: - Building FileConsentCard attachments (to request upload permission) - Building FileInfoCard attachments (to confirm upload completion) - Parsing fileConsent/invoke activities
inline_comments: Build a FileConsentCard attachment for requesting upload permission. Use this for files >= 4MB in personal (1:1) chats.
Build a FileInfoCard attachment for confirming upload completion. Send this after successfully uploading the file to the consent URL.
Parse a fileConsent/invoke activity. Returns null if the activity is not a file consent invoke.
Upload a file to the consent URL provided by Teams. The URL is provided in the fileConsent/invoke response after user accepts.
